title: SMP Revamped
description: A resource Pack that can be used in ANY sort of SMPs with Clean VIsiuals to PvP Qol to Redstone Qol This pack got your all needs in SMP
body:
# SMP Revamped
 
## Why Use This?
I play on various SMPs, but I always had the same problem: I could never find a pack that combined aesthetics, smoothness, and utility all in one.

Instead of compromising, I built my own.

**SMP Revamp** is designed to be the perfect middle ground. It is clean and optimized for PvP, yet stays true to the classic Minecraft aesthetic. I’ve stripped away the visual clutter and improved clarity without losing the "Vanilla" feel.

If you’re looking for a pack that balances competitive combat and survival looks without sacrificing performance, this is for you.

## Features

### PvP Qol
- Retextured Sword to look less cluttery and clean in a Vanilla Way
- Retexured and animated Utilities for better experience 
- Smaller Totem pop
- Bow/CrossBow charge Indicator
- Low Shield
- Outlined Cobwebs
- Smoother Crystals
- Better Anchor
- Low Fire

### Dark GUI
- Clean Dark GUI for EveryThing
- Made With Darkomizer
- Tons of Supported Mods

### Survival Utilities
- Visible Powder Snow
- Redstone Utilities (Smooth Redstone Dust, Redstone Dust Power level Indicator, Direction Arrows on various Redstone Blocks) _see image in gallery for Better Vision_
- No Pumpkin Blur
- Less Obstructive Rain And Snow
- Glowing ores _Requires Continuity_

### Usage
Feel free to edit, take assets, or use it in any modpack BUT add link to this project in description then.

### Credits
Assests Moddified or used from:
- [New Glowing Ore](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-glowing-ores)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
